description: Use this API to modify the data of an existing fixed bus shunt in the working case or to add a new fixed bus shunt to the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Fixed Bus Shunt Data). This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = shunt_data(ibus, id, intgar, realar)

realar.description: GL, fixed shunt admittance (conductance) (0.0 by default).
BL, fixed shunt admittance (susceptance) (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: shunt identifier is more than two characters.
fixed bus shunt table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid shunt status.
